creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
Quick update so it doesn't look like kde@ isn't tracking this. Yuri, thanks a lot for the patch and I'm sorry you ended up doing a lot of duplicate work.

I've been going through your patch looking for differences between what you have and what we've been doing in area51. As you can see, one of the changes became a commit to the ports tree, and I've also been committing a lot of stuff in area51 in response.

I'll post some specific questions later.
